description: A panoramic photograph shows an expansive open-pit mine, likely for lignite extraction, under a partly cloudy sky. The foreground and midground feature vast excavated areas with terraced slopes, exposing layers of light brown earth (overburden) and dark grey/black material (coal). Multiple large industrial machines, possibly bucket-wheel excavators and conveyor systems, are visible across the mining site. In the distant background, a row of wind turbines stands alongside at least two industrial power plants with visible smoke plumes, indicating energy production activities in the broader landscape. The image depicts significant land transformation due to resource extraction and associated energy infrastructure.
